sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n71532" key="cenokustapa/th" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ξενο-κυστᾰπάτη</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[πᾰ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n71532.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">intrigue with strange women,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">AP</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">11.7</biblScope> </bibl> (Nicandr. or <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Nicarch.</author> </bibl>).</sense> </entryFree>
